title: 20 years of Developmental Cell: Looking back.
author_string: Chory, Joanne, Olson, Eric N, Solnica-Krezel, Lilianna, Munro, Sean, Fuchs, Elaine et al.
abstract: In our 20<sup>th</sup> anniversary year, we reflect on how the cell and developmental biology fields have changed since the publication of Developmental Cell's first few issues. In this collection of Voices, authors who published in our early issues discuss the advances that helped shape their field over the past two decades.
